_comment: OPTIONAL example only — Claude Code does NOT auto-apply this on plugin install. Permission grants are a per-user trust decision. To run Atlas without approval prompts, copy the permissions.allow block below into YOUR OWN .claude/settings.json (project) or ~/.claude/settings.json (global), and trim it to the narrowest scope you are comfortable with. These rules are BROAD: they auto-approve all file writes/edits and any python/cmd/powershell command for the whole session, not just Atlas.
